name: sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development pipeline for Claude Code: 15 atomic skills that carry a feature from idea â†’ spec â†’ design â†’ data model â†’ API â†’ tasks â†’ tests â†’ implementation â†’ review â†’ ship, plus a TDD implementation engine with agent-team and dynamic-workflow modes. On an existing codebase start with survey (scans the repo once and persists docs/architecture-map.md â€” the current architecture: module layout, conventions, datastores, a C4 of what exists), so every later stage reads the map instead of re-discovering the code and the spec is written architecture-aware. Then specify â€” it interviews you and writes the spec; then walk the backbone in order; classify-size / glossary / decide-adr are utilities you call anytime. Skills are stack-agnostic and Socratic: survey (current-architecture map), classify-size (XS/S/M/L/XL gate), specify (lightweight interview that creates the spec + acceptance criteria, Socratic per-AC + clean-context critic), clarify (devil's-advocate ambiguity sweep before planning), design (matches the feature to the existing architecture via a brownfield Explore scan, then Arc42 SAD + C4 L1/L2 + inline ADRs with a blast-radius gate), sequences (Mermaid sequence diagrams with generic participants), data-model (data-model.md + paired forward/rollback migrations + drift check), api (OpenAPI 3.1 derived from data-model + sequences + spec), tasks (breakdown emitting a tracker + tasks.json DAG contract), plan-tests (AC-to-test mapping), implement (TDD redâ†’greenâ†’refactor engine that reads tasks.json, builds a dependency DAG, runs sequential / agent-team / dynamic-workflow modes behind feature flags, with a per-task unit+integration+lint+vet gate), review (independent clean-context code review of the whole change against spec/AC + quality, can bounce back to implement), ship (verifies the feature actually runs, writes the changelog, opens the PR â€” never auto-merges), decide-adr (post-hoc ADRs), glossary (lazy CONTEXT.md). Every skill and agent declares an execution profile in frontmatter â€” model (haiku/sonnet/opus/inherit), effort (low/medium/high/xhigh/max), and the agents it spawns â€” chosen by kind of work: opus+high for judgment (spec/design/review/critique/ambiguity), sonnet+medium for execution (tests/code, escalating to high), haiku+low for search; with env-var fallback (CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL / CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL) and .size scaling. Shared Socratic / critic / size-matrix / ask-style / agent-roster logic lives once in skills/_shared and is referenced, not duplicated. Six subagents ship, four read-only and clean-context: sdd-explorer (brownfield scan), sdd-test-author (failing tests), sdd-implementer (makes them pass), sdd-reviewer (independent review), sdd-critic (coherence critique), sdd-devils-advocate (ambiguity hunt). glossary is reconciled in-flow during specify and clarify; api cross-checks ACâ†”endpointâ†”sequence coverage and feeds gaps back; plan-tests lets you choose each AC's test level (unit/integration/e2e). GATE skills hard-refuse when a prerequisite artifact is missing. Each SKILL.md is the source of truth; heavy detail lives in references/, output templates in templates/.
